problem.summary: Compare a host-mediated cross-PE queue path against a GPU-initiated rocSHMEM queue where device code publishes work directly to a remote PE.
outputs: target PE queue receives deterministic QueueEntry records in bounded slots
constraints: No latency or throughput claim without multi-PE timing
Symmetric allocation and rocSHMEM initialization are required outside the scaffold
Queue capacity, memory ordering, and overflow policy must be documented before measurement

verification.method: Drain the target queue and compare received payloads, source PE ids, and sequence numbers against the host-mediated reference.

curation.notes: This scaffold records the host-mediated versus GPU-initiated design boundary only. Future records must label HIP-event-only measurements as timing-only and preserve losing attempts as negative examples.
